name: spiritual-midwifery
description: Ina May Gaskin's 'Spiritual Midwifery' — the classic guide to natural childbirth that transformed how we understand birth, with principles, techniques, and real birth stories from The Farm Midwifery Center.
useCase: Prepare for natural childbirth, understand the fear-tension-pain cycle, learn labor techniques, and gain inspiration from real birth stories.
knownRisks: Not a substitute for medical advice — always consult a healthcare provider
Strong preference for natural/home birth — may not suit high-risk pregnancies
Published 1977 — some information may be dated; supplement with current resources
